metadata.description: Parallax — a spec-driven, blind-coder TDD pipeline for Claude Code with an optional cross-model verifier and human-gated safe completion.

plugins.name: parallax
plugins.description: Parallax — independent paths, one verified result. A spec-driven, parallel, blind-coder TDD pipeline: a read-only spec drives a test-writer and a blind-coder independently; a whole-seeing arbiter loops until green, then pushes a feature branch. /parallax:resolve turns a parked spec-gap into a verified safe completion via a new contract generation; /parallax:spec runs an Existing Affordance Review to avoid needless new subsystems.
